examples: Did you know it will tenderize meats?
You can also use vinegar to tenderize seafood steaks.
Like braising, slow cookers tenderize meat slowly as it cooks.
When making this salad, Mr. Brock tosses his beets with some grapefruit bitters to tenderize the rounds.
As the oats tenderize they'll release their starch and produce a sumptuous gravy that binds the dish together.
